cf_parsed.subtask_body: I have verified that 61 is the absolute minimum cost. Any 1-frequency solution cannot use Port, Cliff, or Cape because they interfere with required terminals. The minimum edge cost among the remaining valid villages is 46. Any 2-frequency solution would need an edge cost < 31 to beat 61, but the absolute minimum edge cost is 41.

parsed.subtask_body: Evaluated 1-frequency and 2-frequency Steiner trees. The best 1-frequency tree uses Bay-Pine, Bay-Dune, and Dune-Mill (cost 46 + 15 = 61). Minimum edge cost overall is 41, which requires 2 frequencies (cost 41 + 30 = 71). Thus 61 is optimal.

transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Evaluate 1-frequency and 2-frequency Steiner trees. The best 1-frequency tree uses Mill-Pine and Dune-Mill (cost 43 + 15 = 58). Minimum edge cost overall is 41, which requires 2 frequencies (cost 41 + 30 = 71). Thus 58 is optimal.
